description_long: This bird features a compact body with olive-green upperparts and a rich chestnut-brown crown and nape. Its face and throat are black, contrasting with a white patch near the eye and a white belly. The wings and tail are olive-brown, with the tail being long and slender. The beak is short, straight, and conical, suited for seed eating. The legs are dark, blending with the overall earthy tones of the plumage.
description: A small bird with olive-green wings, a chestnut-brown crown, black face, and a long, slender tail.
description_view_0: Side view showing the olive-green back, brown crown, black face, and long tail.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the straight, narrow tail and the brown and olive coloration of the back.
description_view_2: Opposite side view with similar features to view 0, showing the white belly and black face.
description_view_3: Frontal view displaying the black face, white throat patch, and brown crown.
attribute_plumage_pattern: solid brown crown, black face and throat, olive-green wings and back, white belly and throat patch
